name: Tallahassee (United States)
description: A white field bearing the City of Tallahassee emblem at the centre, rendered in blue and red with black detailing.
history: The current municipal flag of Florida's capital city; like many U.S. city flags, it places a centred civic emblem on a white ground.

features.symbolism: A composite emblem rendered in blue and red containing the city name 'Tallahassee', references to the area's seven hills, and stylised civic motifs representing the Florida state capital.
